creator: kairu0@gmail.com
text: Zoneminder port 1.25.0_3 could compile with graphics/libjpeg-turbo. Port 1.25.0_4 seems to explicitely require graphics/libjpeg. Is it possible to omit graphics/libjpeg again when graphics/libjpeg-turbo is already installed? (Or better yet, prefer graphics/libjpeg-turbo in make.conf?)
